name: bobager
description: A chatbot interface with GitHub MCP integration

scripts.start: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(cat mcp-config.json | grep GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN | cut -d'"' -f4) node server.js
scripts.dev: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(cat mcp-config.json | grep GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN | cut -d'"' -f4) nodemon server.js
